headline: Intuit secured a $5.8 billion short-term revolving credit facility to support its early tax refund offering.
investor_impact: This facility ensures Intuit has ample liquidity to meet peak tax season demand for its early refund product, a key competitive feature for TurboTax. Because funds are only disbursed post-IRS confirmation, credit risk is negligible while supporting top-line growth and customer retention.
key_figures: Up to 5 days early access to tax refunds
